structure.unit: Warehouses, Cold Storage and Refrigerated Locker Plants
Handling and Sale of Burley Tobacco

law.text:
Sales of burley tobacco at warehouses or loosefloors shall be conducted so as to conform to one of the following methods:
Sales to be at the rate of not more than 90,000 pounds per hour, per set of buyers, or
Sales to be at the rate of not more than 360 baskets per hour per set of buyers.
